hero.headline: Your pet deserves world-class veterinary care
hero.subheadline: Veterinary Hospital in David, Chiriquí, Panama. 4 passionate specialists, cutting-edge technology, and emergency care available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are more than a clinic. We are your family's trusted partner for animal health in Chiriquí. Behind every consultation and treatment, there's a passionate team that genuinely loves what they do. We recently reached a milestone: we are now a full Veterinary Hospital, with modern facilities and specialized equipment to deliver a higher level of care.

services.title: Excellence Services
services.subtitle: Specialized medical care with international standards

items.consulta: Comprehensive evaluation by specialists for preventive and curative well-being.
items.emergencia: Immediate critical care available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.
items.cirugia: Advanced surgical procedures with constant digital monitoring.
items.laboratorio: Accurate results in minutes with our in-house laboratory.
items.cardiologia: Diagnosis and treatment of complex cardiac pathologies.
items.exoticos: Specialists in birds, reptiles, and small mammals.

successStories.title: Success Stories
successStories.subtitle: Real stories demonstrating our commitment to life

mickey.title: Success Story: Mickey
mickey.description: Mickey was hit by a car and suffered multiple hip fractures. After orthopedic surgery and physiotherapy, he was discharged today walking on his own.

hunter.title: Success Story: Hunter
hunter.description: Hunter arrived with parvovirus and went through delicate moments. Thanks to timely treatment and specialized hospitalization, he regained his appetite and became himself again.

guacamayo.title: Non-Traditional Species
guacamayo.description: A macaw arrived after being attacked by dogs. It had minor injuries to its face and wing, but with timely care, it is stable and under our expert care.

emergencies.title: Emergency?
emergencies.subtitle: Is your pet having an emergency?
emergencies.description: Don't wait. Every second matters. We are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year to handle any critical situation threatening your pet's life.

technology.title: Cutting-Edge Technology
technology.subtitle: Hospital-grade equipment for the best care

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Ready to take care of your pet?
contact.description: Book an appointment or visit us in David, Chiriquí. Someone will always be here for you.

footer.slogan: Your best friend deserves the best!
